title: MARA Stock Earnings: Marathon Digital Holdings Beats EPS, Misses Revenue for Q1 2024
text: Marathon Digital Holdings delivered mixed results for Q1 2024. The bitcoin mining firm exceeded profit expectations, posting earnings per share of $1.26 compared to analyst projections of just 22 cents, a significant outperformance. However, the revenue picture told a different story. Marathon reported sales of $165.20 million, which fell short of the consensus estimate of $180.69 million by approximately 8.6%. The company demonstrated stronger operational efficiency and profitability per share than anticipated, yet failed to meet top-line revenue expectations, suggesting potential headwinds in mining volumes or pricing during the quarter.
